D:\AAA_C\AAA_Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\compression.dir/objects.a
D:\AAA_C\AAA_MinGW\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\compression.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\compression.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\AAA_C\AAA_MinGW\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -shared -o D:\AAA_C\compression-tool\bin\compression.cp312-win_amd64.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\compression.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\compression.dir\linkLibs.rsp
